title: Verity
description:
Verity is my plugin that’s a love letter to server owners it handles warps, perks VIP features staff tools, and all the things that wow your players
It’s lightweight its modular and it has all the ideas that my small brain could think off
body: Verity is the quiet little gremlin that wipes up after the server and doesn’t tell it anything about what it’s doing. It’ll tell you what commands you can use, it’ll show you your rank without giving too much away, and it’ll make sure the SMP isn’t a drunken spaghetti-slaying mess. No drama, no chaos, just a safe atmosphere to survive in, and the plugin quietly critiquing your life choices.
